title: d-c-fix vinyl wrap Cortes silver marble effect 45 cm x 2 m - sticky back plastic roll for furniture, kitchen & cupboards - contact paper sticker self adhesive film
features: UNMATCHED UPCYCLING WITH GERMAN CRAFTSMANSHIP: Transform ordinary furniture into extraordinary pieces with our premium vinyl wrap! Our sticky back plastic offers sustainable change and creative freedom to refresh your decor in no time. Made in Germany for top precision and quality.
PRACTICAL VERSATILITY FOR EVERY ROOM: From cabinets to kitchen fronts—our vinyl wrap adheres to all smooth surfaces. Add a personal touch to your kitchen, bathroom, office, and more.

INNOVATIVE DESIGN, ROBUST PERFORMANCE: Our sticky back plastic is not only water-resistant and heat-resistant up to 70°C but also easy to apply, cut, and clean—delivering impressive, long-lasting results.

SUSTAINABLE FURNITURE DESIGN WITHOUT COMPROMISE: Revitalize your furniture with style and resourcefulness using our vinyl wrap. Refresh your space without purchasing new furniture—a conscious choice for stylish, eco-friendly decor.

ELEGANT PERSONAL STATEMENTS: Choose from our extensive range of designs, colours, and authentic material looks with our sticky back plastic. Your furniture will make a statement and tell your story—without words.
description: Product Description d-c-fix adhesive films A whole new look thanks to d-c-fix adhesive films - your film world in many colours and designs They are stylish, cost-effective and super easy to work with - with the adhesive films from d-c-fix, old but beloved furniture quickly and easily become new favourite pieces. This is not only top in terms of the latest living trends, but especially in terms of sustainability. When designing kitchen fronts, table tops or dressers, a wide range of different designs can be used. Especially the wood and stone optics such as Ribbeck, Santana and Sonoma Oak or marble prints such as marble grey and white impress with their authentic appearance. But also plain in matte finish provide a dose of modern elegance in the interior. The adhesive films are available as rolls in different dimensions. d-c-fix adhesive film – flexible – ideal for furniture and decoration Application 1 - Kitchen fronts A new kitchen is an investment that wants to be well considered, after all, it must please for a long time. Especially important: the right look. For those who do not want to reach deep into the bag after a few years to change the look of their kitchen, the decorative films from d-c-fix are the perfect means of choice, because not quite current designs as well as signs of wear and small marks disappear in no time at all behind the self-adhesive films. Especially popular when renewing the kitchen fronts? Wood and stone looks as well as plain in matt. Application 2 - Cabinets & Dressers Plain colour? Anyone can! How about a makeover for the dresser or shoe cabinet in the hallway? With the help of the adhesive films from d-c-fix, the pieces of furniture can be transformed into real unique pieces that are not available for a second time. Application 3 - Table tops No doubt, the surfaces of dining and desks are subject to special stress. Scratches, pen marks and other stains make it comfortable all too quickly. This is not particularly aesthetically pleasing. The adhesive films from d-c-fix can help here, because the small unsightly traces of everyday life disappear easily behind the high-quality self-adhesive decorative films from d-c-fix. Scope of application 4 - DIY decoration Sometimes the smallest things make the biggest changes. Flowers and decorative items are known to have a huge impact on the effect of a room. Even with the adhesive films from d-c-fix, small but fine accents can be set that have a great effect – whether flower pots are visually upgraded or drawers are redesigned – with the films from d-c-fix there are no limits to creativity. Make new from old - "sustainability" Taste is changing and what was totally stylish two years ago may now be considered unmodern. So it can also be with furniture. But that doesn't mean you have to separate yourself from them right away. Because the look can always be changed. Here the adhesive films from d-c-fix are the perfect partner, because they come in numerous different designs and can thus turn an unloved piece into a favourite piece in no time at all. And best of all, it is super sustainable! Adhesiveness An absolute advantage of the adhesive films from d-c-fix is that they are self-adhesive and not, such as For example, when applying wallpaper, a special glue is required. This makes processing very easy. And if something goes wrong when gluing - no problem: repositioning is possible without any problems, because the full adhesive strength is only achieved after a few hours. Easy to use Special tools, special know-how or specific glue - nothing like this is required when processing the decorative films from d-c-fix, after all, they stick on their own. If you have scissors, pen and ruler at hand, you are well equipped for cutting. If you want to simplify the installation even further, you can use the d-c-fix processing set with cutter knife and squeegee. Easy to clean Once the film is placed, most of the work is done. Now it's all about taking care of them properly. Cleaning is very easy, because standard cleaning agents can be used. Warm water with a little detergent is best suited as mild soapy water. The film can be easily wiped clean. Wet areas should be rubbed dry with a soft cloth. More stubborn dirt can be removed with alcohol-based detergents. Heat resistance If organic shapes are to be glued with the film, this is no problem. The film can be heated and pulled in order to stick the object appropriately. It can easily withstand temperatures of up to 70 °C in the short term. Can be removed without leaving any residue Don't like the design anymore? No problem. The adhesive films from d-c-fix can also be removed without leaving any residue - the easiest way is to heat the film a little with a hair dryer. Processing adhesive films from d-c-fix - step by step Measure the surface and cut the film. Approx. Peel off 10 cm backing paper and apply film to the edge of the object. Press the film lightly. Gradually remove the back paper. At the same time, press the film with a squeegee to avoid air bubbles.
